Sudheer Vadlamudi

SUMMARY
Java Fullstack Engineer with AI/ML focus, offering over 4 years of experience building scalable enterprise
applications and intelligent systems across healthcare, banking, and retail industries. Skilled in end-to-end
development—from crafting responsive UIs with Angular/React to building resilient microservices with Spring
Boot and deploying AI-powered features in production. Successfully integrated ML models into real-time platforms
using TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, and Spark MLlib, enhancing automation and decision-making. Hands-on with AI
observability , inference APIs, vector search, model monitoring, and data pipeline orchestration.

Java Fullstack Engineer (AI/ML) Feb 2024 – Present
MediqCare Systems Dallas, TX
• Engineered backend microservices using Spring Boot and Hibernate to deliver patient analytics, connecting
data across 50+ clinics.

models deployed via Flask and exposed through REST endpoints.
• Designed real-time patient vitals dashboards in Angular 14, with alerting logic tied to ML outputs using Kafka
event triggers.
